Notice Of Motion For Order Charging Members Interest In Limited Liability Company
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF GE CAPITAL INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC.'s Motion For Order Charging Members Interest In Limited Liability Company is denied without prejudice. Pursuant to CCP Section 708.320, the notice of motion must be served on the judgment debtor and either all of the members of the limited liability company, or the limited liability company itself. Plaintiff's proof of service shows that the notice of motion was only served on counsel for judgment debtor and the judgment debtor. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
